---
title: "Software"
subtitle: Software that I have contributed to
description: >
  Software I have written or contributed to. If you use any of it in your work,
  please consider citing it using the reference provided under each entry's
  details.
listing:
  contents: .
  id: software
  template: software.ejs
  categories: true
  page-size: 50
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
